plugin.name: ida-chat
plugin.description: LLM Chat Client for IDA Pro - Multi-provider reverse engineering assistant (Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, OpenRouter, Ollama, NVIDIA NIM) embedded directly in IDA.

settings.name: Show Setup Wizard
settings.description: Show the setup wizard on plugin launch

settings.name: LLM Provider
settings.description: Provider: claude, gemini, openai, openrouter, ollama, nim

settings.name: Authentication Mode
settings.description: Authentication mode: system (Claude only) or api_key

settings.name: API Key
settings.description: Provider API key/token (optional for Ollama local mode)

settings.name: Model Override
settings.description: Optional model override for the selected provider

settings.name: Base URL Override
settings.description: Optional base URL override (OpenAI-compatible endpoints supported)
